title: Archon + Jira: Drag a Ticket, Get a Pull Request (Live Build)
summary: Archon is an agentic workflow orchestration tool that integrates with GitHub, Slack, Telegram, Discord, and Jira to automate AI-driven coding tasks. The video demonstrates building a Jira adapter that routes tickets to Archon for autonomous bug fixing, pull request generation, and feedback posting.
